unemployed.name: Peasant
unemployed.description: A humble commoner with no special training. What you lack in skill, you make up for in determination.

warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.description: A seasoned fighter trained in the arts of war. Strong and tough, you excel in melee combat.

mage.name: Mage
mage.description: A student of the arcane arts. Your intellect fuels powerful spells, though your body is frail.

ranger.name: Ranger
ranger.description: A wilderness tracker and marksman. At home in the wild, you hunt with deadly precision.

cleric.name: Cleric
cleric.description: A healer devoted to the divine. Your faith grants you the power to mend wounds and cure ailments.

rogue.name: Rogue
rogue.description: A cunning trickster who fights with guile rather than brute force. Quick hands and quicker wits.

assassin.name: Assassin
assassin.description: A deadly shadow who strikes from darkness. Specializes in eliminating targets before they know you are there.

thief.name: Thief
thief.description: A master of acquisition and subterfuge. Locks, pockets, and traps are merely puzzles waiting to be solved.

bard.name: Bard
bard.description: A wandering storyteller and musician. Your silver tongue opens doors that swords cannot.

alchemist.name: Alchemist
alchemist.description: A master of potions and herbal remedies. You transform common ingredients into wondrous concoctions.
